errorBoundary.title: Something crashed
errorBoundary.bodyHome: We lost the thread. Try again or refresh the page.
errorBoundary.bodyMatch: The match crashed on your end. You can retry or head back home — your seat is held as long as the match is live.

install.title: Install Quizelo
install.body: Add the app to your home screen for quick access and full-screen play.
install.iosTip: On iPhone: tap Share ⇪, then "Add to Home Screen".

hero.copy: Competitive multiplayer quiz. Fresh questions every match — no two matches alike. Climb the seasonal ladder.
hero.copyShort: Competitive multiplayer quiz. Fresh questions every match.
hero.question: What is the capital of Australia?

hiw.sub: Each match runs ~5 minutes. You start as one of 10, you finish alone or you're out. Fresh questions every match — no two are alike.
hiw.subShort: ~5 min per match. Fresh questions every match.

phases.title: Elimination
phases.text: 15 multi-choice questions. Wrong answer = lose a life. At zero, you're out. Top 5 survive.

phases.title: 60s Sprint
phases.text: One minute, as many questions as you can answer. Right +1, wrong −1, skip 0. Top 3 scores advance.

phases.title: Finale
phases.text: Three players, sudden death. If everyone gets it right, the slowest loses a life. First to zero is out.

categories.sub: Each match draws from one category or blends them. Specialist? Generalist? The ladder doesn't care.

ranks.sub: Six ranks, ELO shared across all categories. Climb higher, meet stronger opponents.
ranks.seasonP: At the end of every season, the podium walks away with the real deal. Top three on the seasonal ladder get their prize within 14 days.

hero.copy: Fresh questions every match. Three elimination phases. No two matches alike.

quick.title: Quick play
quick.watchAd: Watch an ad to earn +1 game
quick.blocked: Daily quota reached — come back tomorrow
quick.upsellLine: Premium = unlimited matches, ranked mode, and exclusive cosmetics.

ranked.title: Ranked match
ranked.description: Difficulty scales with your ELO. Season {season} — {days, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}.

finaleWaiting.title: You finished {rank}.
finaleWaiting.message: Results will show as soon as the match wraps up.

lobby.title: Filling the table
lobby.waiting: {remaining, plural, =0 {Starting now} =1 {Waiting for 1 more} other {Waiting for # more}}

live.question: QUESTION
live.phase3Rule: Wrong = −1 life. All correct → slowest loses 1 life.
live.skippedNotice: Question skipped — no gain, no loss.

phase3.warning: Wrong = −1 life · Last to answer if all correct = −1 life
phase3.warningShort: All correct → last to answer loses 1 life

second.title: 2ND PLACE
second.tagline: Strong run. Push for the win next time.

phase2.label: PHASE 2 · 60s SPRINT
phase2.title: One minute. As many questions as you can.

phase3.label: PHASE 3 · FINALE
phase3.title: Sudden death. Slowest loses a life.

start.tip: TIP · Quick correct answers gain tempo bonus

referral.title: Invite, play, earn credits.
referral.abuse: Any abuse (fake accounts, self-referrals) leads to account suspension and credit cancellation.

share.title: Join me on Quizelo
share.text: Sign up with my code {code} and earn 50 credits!

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.step1: Share your code with a friend
howItWorks.step2: They sign up with your code
howItWorks.step3: You both earn credits at every milestone

friends.title: YOUR FRIENDS
friends.empty: No friends yet. Share your code to get started.

packs.title: Top up your balance
packs.subtitle: The bigger the pack, the better the rate.

boosts.title: Play ranked harder
boosts.subtitle: No gameplay impact — only on your ELO progression.

boost.doubleEloDesc: Double ELO gains on {count} ranked wins
boost.shieldDesc: Cancels ELO loss on {count} ranked {count, plural, one {loss} other {losses}}

premiumGate.title: The shop is for Premium members
premiumGate.body: Credits, boost cards and inventory are only available with an active Premium subscription. Upgrade to unlock the shop and everything inside.

consent.labelSuffix: and waive my right of withdrawal so the service starts immediately.

premium.subtitle: Unlimited ranked · ELO + seasons · exclusive cosmetics · advanced stats.
premium.disclaimer: Auto-renews. Cancel anytime from your account.

errors.processing: Your payment is being processed. You'll receive a confirmation by email.
errors.incomplete: Payment not completed. Try again or contact support.

cancelDialog.doneBodyDated: You keep Premium until {date}. No further charges.
cancelDialog.doneBodyUndated: You keep Premium until the end of the current period. No further charges.
cancelDialog.askBodyDated: You'll keep Premium until {date}. No refund, but no further charges.
cancelDialog.askBodyUndated: You'll keep Premium until the end of the current period. No refund, but no further charges.

errors.noCustomer: No Stripe subscription linked to this account.
errors.unauthorized: Sign in to manage your subscription.

subscription.title: Quizelo Premium
subscription.upsellLine: Go Premium for cosmetics, modes, and advanced stats.

autoSubmit.label: Auto-submit on timer end
autoSubmit.hint: Submits whatever is typed when time runs out

danger.title: Irreversible actions
danger.deleteSubtitle: All your matches, stats and credits will be wiped.
danger.signOutSubtitle: Come back any time, your data stays.

dialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
dialog.body: This action is permanent. Under GDPR, your right to erasure is applied immediately.

bullets.session: Your session will be closed and you won't be able to sign in with this account again.
bullets.subscription: Your Premium subscription is canceled immediately (prorated refund handled by Stripe).
bullets.history: Your personal information is wiped. The match history you participated in is kept for other players, but anonymized.

errors.emailMismatch: The email you entered doesn't match.
errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to perform this action.

chart.title: ELO PROGRESS — LAST 30 MATCHES
chart.empty: Play your first match to start your curve.

categories.title: ACCURACY BY CATEGORY
categories.empty: Answer a few questions to see your stats.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.legalPrefix: By continuing you agree to our

brand.subtitle: Three elimination phases. Fresh questions every match. No two matches alike.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: A few details and you're in your first room.
signup.referralHelper: If a friend invited you, paste their code here to earn credits.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Drop your email — we'll send a magic link to reset it.
forgot.sent: If that email exists, we just sent a reset link. Check your inbox (and spam).
forgot.error: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.

newPassword.title: Choose a new password
newPassword.subtitle: 8 characters minimum. You'll be sent back to sign in afterwards.
newPassword.done: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
newPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

verify.title: Link sent.
verify.body: We just emailed you a sign-in link. Click it to finish logging in.
verify.hint: Didn't get it? Check spam or wait a few seconds.

verifyBanner.title: Verify your email
verifyBanner.hint: A verification link was sent to {email}.

verifyRequired.title: Confirm your email
verifyRequired.body: To access Quizelo, click the link we sent to {email}.
verifyRequired.hint: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder or request a new one below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your access to and use of Quizelo (the "Service"). By creating an account or using Quizelo, you accept these Terms in full.

p.acceptance: Using the Service implies full acceptance of these Terms. If you don't accept any of the clauses, you must not use Quizelo.
p.account: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for any activity carried out from your account. You agree to provide accurate information at sign-up.
p.subscription: Quizelo Premium is a monthly or yearly auto-renewing subscription. Payment is processed by Stripe. You can cancel any time from /settings; you keep the benefits until the end of the current period, with no prorated refund.
p.fairplay: Quizelo is a competitive game. Any cheating attempt leads to immediate account suspension without notice or refund.
p.ip: All Service content (questions, design, code, sounds, marks) is the property of Quizelo or their respective owners. Any unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
p.liability: The Service is provided "as is", without any guarantee of uninterrupted availability. Quizelo cannot be held liable for indirect damages or data loss linked to the use of the Service.
p.termination: You can delete your account any time from /settings (immediate effect, GDPR-compliant). Quizelo reserves the right to suspend any account in violation of these Terms.
p.law: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of French courts.
p.contact: For any question, reach us at legal@quizelo.app.

li.account2: You must be at least 13 to register.
li.fair1: No bot, automated script or third-party client.
li.fair2: No answer-sharing or coordination in ranked matches.
li.fair3: No buying or selling of accounts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Quizelo collects, uses and protects your personal data, in line with the GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679).

p.controller: The data controller is Mehdi GRAR, sole trader doing business under the trading name "Quizelo". Contact details are listed in the legal mentions.
p.data: We only collect the data strictly necessary to operate the Service:
p.basis: Processing is based on contract performance (article 6.1.b GDPR) for account and gameplay data, and on your consent (article 6.1.a) for non-essential cookies.
p.processors: We share strictly necessary data with the following sub-processors:
p.retention: Account data is kept as long as your account is active. On deletion, personal information is anonymised immediately (right to erasure). Technical logs are kept for 12 months max.
p.rights: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
p.cookies: See the dedicated /legal/cookies page for the full list and the option to update your consent at any time.
p.contact: To exercise your rights or ask a question: privacy@quizelo.app. You can also file a complaint with the CNIL (cnil.fr) or your local supervisory authority.

li.data1: Identifiers: email, handle, password (hashed via scrypt).
li.data2: Game profile: ELO, match history, ranking.
li.data3: Payment: Premium status, Stripe customer ID (card data is handled exclusively by Stripe, never by us).
li.data4: Technical logs: IP, user-agent (security purposes, kept for 30 days).
li.purpose4: Communicate about the Service (email verification, security alerts).
li.processor1: Stripe Inc. (payments) — United States, GDPR safeguards via Standard Contractual Clauses.
li.processor3: Hosting: see legal mentions for the full list.
li.right1: Right of access: get a copy of your data.
li.right2: Right to rectification: correct inaccurate data.
li.right3: Right to erasure: delete your account (immediate from /settings).
li.right4: Right to portability: receive your data in a structured format.
li.right5: Right to object and to restriction of processing.

p.publisherName: Publisher: Mehdi GRAR, sole trader doing business under the trading name "Quizelo".
p.publisherForm: Legal form: Sole trader (entreprise individuelle, French law). NAF / APE code: 6201Z – Computer programming. Date of creation: 29 December 2012.
p.publisherAddress: Address: 136 rue de l'Église, 74970 Marignier, France.
p.director: Mehdi GRAR, in their capacity as sole trader.
p.hostName: Host: [Hosting provider, e.g. Vercel Inc. / OVH SAS].
p.ip: The entire site (texts, graphics, logos, source code) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction without prior written authorization is forbidden.
p.takedown: To report illegal content, write to legal@quizelo.app with a precise description and the URL involved.
p.disputes: Pursuant to articles L.612-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code, the consumer can use the CM2C mediation service — Centre de la Médiation de la Consommation de Conciliateurs de Justice, 14 rue Saint-Jean, 75017 Paris, France (cm2c.net) — free of charge in case of unresolved dispute.

cgv.title: Sales Terms
cgv.intro: These Sales Terms govern any purchase made on Quizelo between Mehdi GRAR — sole trader doing business under the trading name "Quizelo" — (the "Seller") and any adult individual (the "Customer"). They complement the Terms of Service and prevail in case of contradiction on commercial matters.

p.scope: These Sales Terms apply to any order placed by the Customer on Quizelo, regardless of payment method. The Customer acknowledges having read these Terms before validating their order; validation constitutes full acceptance.
p.seller: Mehdi GRAR, sole trader doing business under the trading name "Quizelo". Office: 136 rue de l'Église, 74970 Marignier, France. SIREN 790 231 468 — SIRET 790 231 468 00030. EU VAT FR60 790 231 468. Email: contact@quizelo.app.
p.products: Quizelo sells two types of online digital products:
p.prices: Prices are listed in euros (€), VAT included. French VAT (20%) applies unless otherwise specified.
p.payment: Payment is made exclusively by credit card via Stripe. Card details are never stored by Quizelo. Payment is immediate; no order is validated until Stripe confirms the transaction.
p.execution: The service is delivered as soon as payment is confirmed. Premium access or purchased credits become active on the Customer's account immediately. No physical delivery is involved.
p.subscription: Premium is an auto-renewing subscription (monthly or yearly depending on the chosen plan). The Customer can cancel anytime from /settings: cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. No prorated refund is owed in case of cancellation, except where the right of withdrawal has been validly exercised (see §8).
p.withdrawal: Pursuant to article L.221-18 of the French Code de la consommation, the Customer has 14 days to exercise their right of withdrawal from the conclusion of the contract, by emailing legal@quizelo.app, using the standard withdrawal form, or by any other unambiguous declaration.
p.withdrawalWaiver: However, in line with article L.221-28-13° of the same Code, the Customer expressly waives their right of withdrawal upon validating the order, given that execution of the digital service starts immediately with their prior express consent. This waiver is materialised by the checkbox "I accept the Sales Terms and waive my right of withdrawal" displayed before payment. Without this acceptance, access to the service cannot start.
p.warranty: The Customer benefits from the legal warranty of conformity (articles L.217-3 et seq. of the Code de la consommation) and the warranty against hidden defects (articles 1641 et seq. of the Civil Code). In case of a non-compliant service, the Customer can contact the Seller at legal@quizelo.app within a reasonable timeframe.
p.refund: Any legitimate refund is processed via Stripe on the payment method used for the order, within 14 days of the Seller's decision.
p.complaints: Any complaint must be sent to legal@quizelo.app with a precise description of the issue and the Stripe transaction reference (visible in the email confirmation).
p.mediation: If a dispute is not resolved amicably, the Customer can use the CM2C mediation service — Centre de la Médiation de la Consommation de Conciliateurs de Justice, 14 rue Saint-Jean, 75017 Paris, France (cm2c.net) — free of charge, in accordance with article L.612-1 of the Code de la consommation. The Customer may also use the EU online dispute resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
p.law: These Sales Terms are governed by French law. Failing amicable resolution, any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of French courts, subject to mandatory provisions applicable to consumers.

li.products1: Quizelo Premium: monthly or yearly subscription unlocking unlimited ranked mode, exclusive cosmetics, and the boost shop.
li.products2: Credit packs: one-time non-refundable purchases (except where the right of withdrawal applies), usable in the shop to buy boost cards.
li.prices3: Credit packs: prices listed on the shop page.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Quizelo uses a limited number of cookies and storage technologies to operate. Here's which ones and why.

p.essential: Strictly necessary to operate the Service. Without them, authentication or payment can't work. No consent required (article 82 of the French Data Protection Act).
p.analytics: No third-party analytics enabled at this time.
p.marketing: No marketing cookies at this time.
p.choice: You can update your choice anytime via the button below.

li.essential1: Auth.js — session cookie (lifetime: 8 hours to 30 days depending on mode).
li.essential2: Stripe — payment iframes loaded on demand during a checkout.

cookies.summary: Quizelo uses essential cookies to operate the Service. With your consent we may also enable analytics and marketing — none are active today.
cookies.customizeIntro: Pick the categories you allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled.

essential.title: Essential
essential.body: Authentication, payment, language preference. Strictly necessary.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Anonymous statistics to understand how the service is used.
